evidence: pytest passed: card selection records select SFX event through debug_audio_state.
pytest passed: play attempt records a semantic audio event while visible state transitions remain valid.
gdUnit passed: AudioController records SFX events and bounded debug history.
pytest passed: MusicToggleButton enables and disables music state immediately.
gdUnit passed: music toggle and volume state are reflected in debug_state.
pytest passed: SettingsButton opens/closes the Audio settings panel.
pytest passed: SFX toggle and Volume preset apply immediately in debug_audio_state.
pytest passed: Result banner exposes QuitButton and records a safe quit request state.
pytest passed: ResultNewRoundButton clears quit request and returns to landlord phase.

main.notes: Per user instruction, image/VQA review was not run or embedded in chat. Existing visual/layout E2E checks passed, and v0.5.0 settings controls are covered by semantic E2E state assertions.

minor_issues: v0.5.0 uses procedural/testable audio tones rather than authored audio assets; this keeps the prototype self-contained but is not final production sound design.
Quit is represented as a safe in-scene quit-request state for testability rather than terminating the E2E process.
